problems.cause: Invalid AGREE syntax in mode equation; incorrect use of '->' with invalid temporal recurrence
problems.minimal_edit: Replace `mode : int = mode_initial -> if pre(mode) < mode then pre(mode) + 1 else pre(mode);` with `mode : int = mode_initial -> if pre(mode) < mode_initial then pre(mode) + 1 else pre(mode);`

executor_steps: Identify the invalid AGREE mode equation on line 25
Replace the incorrect temporal recurrence expression with a valid one using pre(mode) only
Ensure the mode equation correctly reflects the intended behavior of incrementing mode when pre(mode) < mode_initial
